body:
Hey Brandon, just a heads up — your mom and I haven't heard from you in a couple weeks and Grandma keeps asking how clinical is going. I know senior year is busy, but a quick call once a week would mean a lot, especially to her.

No pressure on length. Even a five minute check-in is fine. Sunday evenings usually work for us.

Thanks, Dad
subject: Sunday calls
snippet: Hey Brandon, just a heads up — your mom and I haven't heard from you in a couple...

body:
Hey Dad, fair. Clinical and training have eaten the calendar. I'll set a recurring block Sunday evenings so I actually call instead of meaning to.

This week was Lakeview Regional med-surg rotation plus two interval sessions at Wirth. Tell Grandma I'll call her Sunday — she can quiz me on whatever she wants.

Brandon
subject: Re: Sunday calls
snippet: Hey Dad, fair. Clinical and training have eaten the calendar. I'll set a recurri...

body:
Are you free for lunch any day this week? I keep walking past that new banh mi spot in Dinkytown and I refuse to try it alone.

Let me know what works — I'm flexible Thursday or Friday, before you disappear into clinical again.
subject: Lunch this week?
snippet: Are you free for lunch any day this week? I keep walking past that new banh mi sp...

body:
Thursday works. Line's always out the door there, which is usually a good sign. Noon, or later to beat the rush?

Fair warning: I'm getting the spicy one even though it ruins me every time. We share a kitchen — you've seen the aftermath.
subject: Re: Lunch this week?
snippet: Thursday works. Line's always out the door there, which is usually a good sign. N...

body:
You NEVER learn. Let's do 12:30 so the worst of it clears. I'll meet you there — it's on 4th St SE near the bookstore.

Feels like forever since we actually sat down to eat instead of you inhaling oatmeal over a textbook. See you Thursday!
subject: Re: Lunch this week?
snippet: You NEVER learn. Let's do 12:30 so the worst of it clears. I'll meet you there — ...

body:
Hey Brandon, hope clinical's going alright. Your mom and I are redoing the back patio in Edina and I wanted your eyes on the layout before I commit. You're the one who actually measures things twice.

Contractor sent a rough sketch. Mainly wondering about the flow from the back door to the seating area. Your mom thinks it's fine but I want a second opinion.

No rush, whenever you get a chance this week.
subject: Patio layout — second opinion
snippet: Hey Brandon, hope clinical's going alright. Your mom and I are redoing the back p...

body:
Hey Dad, took a look. Overall layout's solid, but the contractor has the main walkway too narrow. If you want furniture on both sides you need at least 4 feet of clearance, ideally more.

Also the pergola placement will block most of the afternoon light. Your yard faces south, so I'd shift it a few feet to the left.

Want to hop on a call to go through it? Easier than email.
subject: Re: Patio layout — second opinion
snippet: Hey Dad, took a look. Overall layout's solid, but the contractor has the main wa...

body:
Good catch on the walkway. I mentioned something similar to the contractor but he said it'd be fine. I'll push back. And yes, the yard faces south, so your point on the pergola lands.

A call would be great. Free Saturday morning, around 10? I'll pull up the full plans. Your mom will join — she has opinions about the planters.

Thanks for taking the time.
subject: Re: Patio layout — second opinion
snippet: Good catch on the walkway. I mentioned something similar to the contractor but he...

body:
Saturday at 10 works. I'll send a calendar invite so we don't forget. And of course Mom can join — more input is better at this stage.

I'll take another pass at the plans tonight and jot down notes. Mostly want to look at the drainage near the foundation. Contractors underprice that and then it's a headache later.

See you Saturday.
subject: Re: Patio layout — second opinion
snippet: Saturday at 10 works. I'll send a calendar invite so we don't forget. And of cour...

body:
Hey Brandon, let's nail down the Boundary Waters trip before it sneaks up on us. I'm thinking we drive up to the entry point Thursday evening to beat the weekend crowd. Nils is coming down from Duluth and can meet us at Grand Marais.

Can you make it up by 7? I want the permits sorted and gear sorted before dark.

- Dad
subject: Boundary Waters logistics
snippet: Hey Brandon, let's nail down the Boundary Waters trip before it sneaks up on us. ...

body:
Hey Dad, Thursday at 7 works. I'm off clinical by 3 so there's plenty of time assuming 35 north isn't a mess. I can bring the food barrel and handle dinners if that splits things up.

Want me to grab the portage packs from Grandma's garage on the way? Pretty sure that's where they ended up after last year.

- Brandon
subject: Re: Boundary Waters logistics
snippet: Hey Dad, Thursday at 7 works. I'm off clinical by 3 so there's plenty of time ass...

body:
Food barrel would be perfect, thank you. Bring a mix — Nils is doing the no-meat thing again, so pack extra lentils and oatmeal. And yes, grab the portage packs from Grandma's. Last I heard they're behind the canoe rack.

Your mom is handling the maps and the permit. I'll sort the canoe rental and life jackets.

- Dad
subject: Re: Boundary Waters logistics
snippet: Food barrel would be perfect, thank you. Bring a mix — Nils is doing the no-meat ...

body:
Sounds like a plan. I'll text Nils so we're not doubling up on gear. One thing — do we have campsites locked, or are we racing other groups for them? I want to be back by Sunday afternoon; I've got a long run scheduled and Coach won't accept canoe portaging as a substitute.

Let me know if you need anything else picked up on the way.

- Brandon
subject: Re: Boundary Waters logistics
snippet: Sounds like a plan. I'll text Nils so we're not doubling up on gear. One thing — ...

body:
Permit's reserved, so we've got our entry day locked. We'll be back early Sunday — your training run is safe.

I think we're set. Bring yourself, the food barrel, and the portage packs and we're good. Really looking forward to it. Hasn't been the four of us out on the water since last summer.

- Dad
subject: Re: Boundary Waters logistics
snippet: Permit's reserved, so we've got our entry day locked. We'll be back early Sunday ...

body:
Hey Brandon, hope clinical's going well. My internet provider says my contract's up for renewal and the new rate is almost $30 more a month. You mentioned a while back that you talked them down — any chance you remember what to say to get a decent rate?

I'm no good at these calls and don't want to get talked into something I don't need. Let me know when you have a minute.

Dad
subject: Internet renewal - need your help
snippet: Hey Brandon, hope clinical's going well. My internet provider says my contract's ...

body:
Hey Dad, yeah I remember. Trick is to call retention directly, not regular support — say you're thinking about canceling and they'll transfer you. Then tell them you've seen better rates and ask what promotions they can apply. They usually have unadvertised deals they only offer when you push.

If they won't budge, name a competitor. Even if you're not switching, it usually gets them to escalate. Whole call's maybe 20 minutes. Let me know how it goes — if they give you trouble I'll get on the phone and walk you through it next time I'm in Edina.

Brandon
subject: Re: Internet renewal - need your help
snippet: Hey Dad, yeah I remember. Trick is to call retention directly, not regular suppor...

body: Hey Brandon, hope the week's going well. Race registration for the Mora Vasaloppet opened and the early-bird window closes Friday. Coach Lars said the club's doing a group entry to lock the discounted rate — do you want me to add you to the list, or are you handling your own this year? Just need a yes by Thursday so I can send one payment for the whole group.
subject: Vasaloppet registration
snippet: Hey Brandon, hope the week's going well. Race registration for the Mora Vasalopp...

body:
Add me to the group entry — early-bird's worth it. I'll Venmo you my share tonight so it's off your plate.

Doing the 51k classic again. My clinical schedule should clear by then, but if it doesn't I'll deal with it. Either way I'm racing.

Thanks for organizing it.

Brandon
subject: Re: Vasaloppet registration
snippet: Add me to the group entry — early-bird's worth it. I'll Venmo you my share tonigh...

body:
Got you on the list, 51k classic. Payment's in, so you're locked. I'll send the carpool and lodging plan once a few more people confirm.

Keep the volume up but don't fry yourself before exams — I'd rather you show up healthy than overtrained. We'll do tempo work at Wirth next week.

Lars
subject: Re: Vasaloppet registration
snippet: Got you on the list, 51k classic. Payment's in, so you're locked. I'll send the c...
